text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Mayano Top Gun and<n>Oguri Cap
out on the track.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huff... Pant... Phew.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: That was a great run, Oguri! Here,<n>have this! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: A yakisoba dog? Why are you giving<n>me this?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's a little "just-because"<n>present! From me
to you!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Make sure you take a break after<n>you eat it. Do
you copy?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Grrrowl...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh... That was my stomach.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You're amazing, Mayano. Thanks for<n>this! I'll
have it right now.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I can't help feeling puzzled by their<n>odd
conversation. While I wonder<n>about it, my gaze
wanders toward<n>Mayano Top Gun.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hm? Is there something you wanna<n>ask?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you mean from earlier? Well, Oguri<n>looked
upset just now, right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I figured something was up with her,<n>but I didn't
know what exactly...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
So I asked around, and that's how I<n>got to the
bottom of it!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Aw, that makes sense... I get anxious<n>when my
times don't improve too.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, we all have days where we<n>really want to
try harder. So I figured it<n>might be nice to look
after her and<n>make sure she doesn't overdo it.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to make her feel better, so I<n>did what
my dad used to do for me!
choice_data_list: That's why you got her a gift?
That's why you got her a gift?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yep! No matter how busy my dad<n>was, he could
always tell when I was<n>sad.

text_block_list.name: Mayano's Father
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead and open it. You're always<n>working so
hard, my dear little Maya.

text_block_list.name: Mayano's Father
text_block_list.text: That's what I call a "just-because"<n>present.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
He didn't get me anything special or<n>whatever. It
was usually just snacks<n>or stationery.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But knowing my dad was always<n>thinking of me
made me forget all<n>about my worries!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
So that's what inspired me to get<n>something to
cheer Oguri up!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Besides, doesn't getting someone a<n>present for
no particular reason kinda<n>feel like a grown-up
thing to do?
choice_data_list: Your father is a wonderful man.
Your father is a wonderful man.
It really is mature to be considerate of others.
It really is mature to be considerate of others.
Maybe I should give something too.
Maybe I should give something too.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Besides, doesn't getting someone a<n>present for
no particular reason kinda<n>feel like a grown-up
thing to do?
choice_data_list: Your father is a wonderful man.
Your father is a wonderful man.
It really is mature to be considerate of others.
It really is mature to be considerate of others.
Maybe I should give something too.
Maybe I should give something too.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I know! Isn't he?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I talk to my dad a lot on LANE, and he<n>even
sends me little "just-because"<n>presents on there
too.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Here... Check these out!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
This one's a fancy cafe he saw after<n>landing!
And this is a pretty view, and<n>here's a cute kitty
pic he sent me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But you know, it's not the gifts that<n>make me
happy, it's knowing he's<n>thinking of me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The grace with which she receives<n>other
people's kindness leaves quite<n>an impression
on me.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I wonder where we should go the<n>next time I get
to see him. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes when he doesn't have<n>any flights
scheduled, we go out on<n>father-daughter dates!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: We'll go out shopping or visit cafes...<n>Oh, I know!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Do you think you could recommend<n>somewhere
awesome for me and my<n>dad to go? ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
How about a place that's mature and<n>exciting,
but also cute? And a little<n>thrilling too!
choice_data_list: Those criteria are all over the place!
Those criteria are all over the place!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I anguish over Mayano Top Gun's<n>long list of
conflicting demands.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Aren't I? I'm practically an<n>adult lady
already! ♪

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Oh, there she is! ☆ Hey there, Maya! ★

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ooh, it's Marvey! Hi hi!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
We're about to head out to a cafe! ☆<n>The
rainbow pudding with whipped<n>cream there is
bound to be marvelous!<n>★

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Is that a new dessert? You're<n>not a real
adult unless you keep up<n>with the trends! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Watching Mayano Top Gun dash off,<n>I glimpse a
picture-perfect example of<n>youth in full bloom.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I suddenly remember what I'm<n>carrying in my
pocket and tell her that I<n>have something for her.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh? But why? I haven't even done<n>anything.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Are you copying me? ♪ Yay! I<n>wonder
what it is?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ooh, a lollipop! I love these! Thank<n>you so much!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! I'm so happy! ♪
